name: Boot Barn Holdings, Inc.
business: We are the largest lifestyle retail chain devoted to western and work-related footwear, apparel and accessories in the United States. We target a broad and growing demographic, ranging from passionate western and country enthusiasts to workers seeking dependable, high-quality footwear and apparel.
sellsTo: workers seeking dependable, high-quality footwear and apparel
customers employed in agriculture, oil and gas, manufacturing and construction industries

exposures.sentence: Our e-commerce sales as a portion of total consolidated net sales were 10.4% and 10.5% in fiscal 2026 and fiscal 2025, respectively.
We have also made investments in our e-commerce infrastructure, including adding automation to our distribution centers to support expanding e-commerce growth.
Many of our customers are employed in the agriculture, oil and gas, manufacturing and construction industries.

Our exclusive brands include Cody James, Shyanne, Idyllwind, Hawx, Moonshine Spirit, Rank 45, Cody James Black 1978, Gibson, Cody James Work, Cleo + Wolf, and El Dorado.

catalysts.sentence: We estimate that our capital expenditures in fiscal 2027 will be between approximately $125.0 million and $130.0 million, which is net of estimated landlord tenant allowances of $47.6 million.
